title: Inspect this repo for x-auto unpublished draft sources and replacement entry points. Return only the concrete file paths and the minimum findings needed to operate on stale drafts.
summary_text: - [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md): Notion is canonical for `Body`/`Body JA`/`Status`/`Scheduled`; stale thumbnail flags should be repaired in queue+Notion before treating drafts as unpostable. - [scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py): Runtime draft/queue health reads live `post_queue.json` and checks `scheduled_for`/`image_path`/file existence. - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json): Live unpublished draft source referenced by health/readiness flows. - [docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md): Draft-only audit snapshot; reports 10 draft rows missing `scheduled_for` and `image_path`. - [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json): Repo snapshot of draft candidates (historical seed, not runtime queue). - [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json): Queue-shaped local snapshot (historical candidate set). - [scripts/local/integrations/xauto-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-thumbnail-gen.js): Primary thumbnail generation entrypoint (Manus-first, Gemini fallback) for draft replacement assets. - [scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py): Canonical per-row replacement sync (hash parity, copies to `x-auto/images`, updates queue metadata, patches Notion thumbnail fields). - [scripts/local/xauto_generate_missing_draft_thumbnails.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_generate_missing_draft_thumbnails.py): Batch generator that emits dated replacement images + manifest. - [output/x-auto/20260404_missing-draft-thumbnails-manifest.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/output/x-auto/20260404_missing-draft-thumbnails-manifest.json): Input manifest for batch sync. - [scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py): Batch stale-thumbnail repair script; hardcoded to 20260404 manifest + fixed ID map. - [scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh): Draft creation entrypoint (external generator in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto`), only creates `draft` rows. - [config/integrations/local-systems.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json), [config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json), [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh), [scripts/lib/orchestrator-nl-hints.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-nl-hints.sh): Wiring for auto-routing x-auto draft requests to `x-auto-draft-only`. - [docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md) vs [output/x-auto/20260404_missing-draft-thumbnails-manifest.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/output/x-auto/20260404_missing-draft-thumbnails-manifest.json): ID sets do not overlap (`10` vs `13`, overlap `0`), so the dated batch repair path is stale for the current readiness rows.
